turns.user_message: I used to feel so sharp and on top of things. Now I just feel foggy and slow.
That mental fog has settled in and it just won't lift. I feel like I'm moving through mud every single day.
My mind feels completely blank and useless now. I can't even remember what it was like to think clearly.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by contrasting with how things used to be.
